---
pagetitle: "Data Safety with AI"
title: "[Data Safety with AI]{.amber}"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#2C3E50"
  data-background-image: figs/banner.png
  data-background-size: 24%
  data-background-position: right 20% center
  class: dark-centered
  style: text-align:left;
---

## Recap {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/recap.qmd >}}

## [Section 1]{.amber}<br>Counter-productivity of AI {.dark-centered .center}

## Fast [≠]{.coral} Better {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/fast-not-better.qmd >}}

## The reviewer's question {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/reviewer-test.qmd >}}

## Three failure modes {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/failure-modes.qmd >}}

## The [reasoning]{.teal} is the analysis {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/lost-reasoning.qmd >}}

## Where AI [clearly]{.teal} helps {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/where-helps.qmd >}}

## [Section 2]{.amber}<br>The dilemma in data science {.dark-centered .center}

## Missing values — [it depends why]{.purple} {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/missing-values.qmd >}}

## Every interesting decision {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/decisions.qmd >}}

## Why a [harness loop]{.coral} fails here {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/harness-fails.qmd >}}

## The credibility question {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/credibility.qmd >}}

## [Section 3]{.amber}<br>A successful workflow {.dark-centered .center}

## Human as [gatekeeper]{.teal} {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/gatekeeper.qmd >}}

## Two non-negotiables {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/non-negotiables.qmd >}}

## Delegation map {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/delegation.qmd >}}

## Pin the decisions in code {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/pin-decisions.qmd >}}

## Verify against an [independent]{.teal} check {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/verify.qmd >}}

## Two issues data science makes worse {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/repro-disclosure.qmd >}}

## [Verify]{.amber}, then trust {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/mindset.qmd >}}

## Three takeaways {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/takeaways.qmd >}}

## Thank you {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/closing.qmd >}}
